LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS INTRACORP SAN FRNCISCO LLC AND 55 PAGE STREET LLC'S MOTION TO DISMISS IS CONTINUED TO JUNE 8, 2016 AT 9:30 A.M., IN DEPT. 302 EITHER FOR PROOF THAT PLAINTIFFS COMPLIED WITH THE NOTICE REQUIREMENTS OF THE PRELITIGATION PROCEDURES SET FORTH IN CIVIL CODE 910 BY 5PM ON JUNE 6, 2016 OR, IF THERE HAS BEEN NO SUCH COMPLIANCE, FOR DISMISSAL OF THIS CASE WITH PREJUDICE. THE COURT WILL SIGN AN ORDER CONTINUING THE MATTER. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976.

Defendants Intracorp San Frncisco Llc And 55 Page Street Llc'S Motion To Dismiss
Off Calendar Jun-09-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ryan Patrick of Wiegel Law Group telephone number 415-522-8230 for Plaintiff SF Civic Plaza LLC.
Joshua Haevernick of Gordon & Rees telephone number 415-986-5900 for Defendant Intracorp San Francisco LLC.

Mr. Patrick argued that the right to repair act does not apply this case, and explained that Plaintiffs are not the owners of the residential units, but that they own the commercial property. This now being a moot point, Defendants Intracorp San Francisco Llc And 55 Page Street LLC'S Motion To Dismiss is denied without prejudice. Mr. Patrick is to prepare a form of order.

Judge: Suzanne Bolanos. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/SB)

Defendants Intracorp San Francisco Llc And 55 Page Street Llcs Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss
Off Calendar Jun-08-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

DEFENDANTS INTRACORP SAN FRNCISCO LLC and 55 PAGE STREET LLC Motion To Dismiss is continued to June 9, 2016 at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 302 to determine whether plaintiffs complied with the Civil Code Section 910 prelitigation procedures or whether the case should be dismissed pursuant to the April 7, 2015 order of Judge Kahn.

Judge: Suzanne Bolanos. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not Reported. (302/SB)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-09-2016 Continued To Jul-27-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Defendants Intracorp San Francisco Llc And 55 Page Street Llcs Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss
Off Calendar Apr-07-2016 Continued To Jun-08-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

DEFENDANTS INTRACORP SAN FRNCISCO LLC and 55 PAGE STREET LLC'S Motion To Dismiss is continued to June 8, 2016 at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 302 either for proof that plaintiffs complied with the notice requirements of the prelitigation procedures set forth in Civil Code 910 by 5pm on June 6, 2016 or, if there has been no such compliance, for dismissal of this case with prejudice. The Court will sign an order continuing the matter.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-13-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: STANLEY RIDDELL, ESQ., 415.433.1900, FOR PLAINTIFFS SF CIVIC PLAZA LLC et al.
DANIEL BLOMGREN, ESQ., 415.986.5900, FOR DEFENDANTS INTRACORP SAN FRANCISCO LLC & 55 PAGE STREET LLC.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: DEFENDANT INTRACORP SAN FRANCISCO LLC'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS Overruled. As to the first ground for demurrer to the Complaint, Defendant has failed to establish that the entire complaint is barred by lack of standing. As to the second ground for demurrer, the complaint is not uncertain. Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185
